# PAV vs STL-rho: empirical comparison (auto-generated)

This file is regenerated by ``scripts/run_pav_comparison.py``. Do not hand-edit --- changes will be clobbered on the next run.

PAV (Process Advantage Verifier; Setlur et al. 2024, [arXiv:2410.08146](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.08146)) is the learned process-reward baseline. We compare its held-out discriminability against the closed-form STL-rho verifier on the canonical trajectory store.

## Headline (per task family)

| task | spec | n_train | n_test | STL AUC | PAV AUC | PAV - STL | crossover_n | PAV train (s) | STL score (s) |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| bio_ode.repressilator | `bio_ode.repressilator.easy` | 2000 | 400 | 1.000 | 0.000 | -1.000 | - | 1.36 | 0.0515 |
| glucose_insulin | `glucose_insulin.tir.easy` | 2000 | 400 | 1.000 | 0.819 | -0.181 | - | 1.45 | 0.0507 |

## Spearman rank correlation

| task | PAV vs success | STL vs success | PAV vs rho | STL vs rho |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| bio_ode.repressilator | -0.867 | +0.961 | -0.828 | +1.000 |
| glucose_insulin | +0.557 | +0.874 | +0.773 | +1.000 |

## Sample efficiency

Each row is a PAV refit at the indicated train-set size.
STL AUC is the same as in the headline table (constant in train size).

### bio_ode.repressilator  (`bio_ode.repressilator.easy`)

| n_train | PAV AUC | PAV train (s) | PAV final train MSE | PAV final val MSE |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 100 | 0.056 | 0.31 | 0.03753 | 0.02217 |
| 500 | 0.064 | 0.52 | 0.03579 | 0.06225 |
| 1000 | 0.000 | 0.78 | 0.03452 | 0.06381 |
| 2000 | 0.000 | 0.83 | 0.03061 | 0.04432 |

## Computational cost asymmetry

STL-rho needs zero training and a single closed-form pass per trajectory (see ``stl_seed/stl/evaluator.py``). PAV needs the full training pool, the per-step MC label computation (kNN), and an MLP fit. The ``PAV train (s)`` column above is the wall-clock time for the canonical PAV fit at the largest train size.

## Provenance

- PAV implementation: ``src/stl_seed/baselines/pav.py``
- Comparison harness: ``src/stl_seed/baselines/comparison.py``
- This script: ``scripts/run_pav_comparison.py``
- Canonical trajectories: ``data/canonical/``
